untranslatable_reason: Signal requires order flow analysis (ONN/OFF indices) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. Order flow metrics, institutional flow detection, and asset class comparative analysis (risky vs safe asset flows) are not present in the standard OHLCV/technical indicators provided. This signal requires specialized order flow/liquidity data feeds not included in the backtest engine.
translation_notes: The signal CHAN_AT_DRY_9 is fundamentally based on order flow divergence between risky assets (stocks, commodities, risky currencies) and safe assets (bonds, etc.). The original source mentions 'ONN' (On) and 'OFF' (Off) baskets. These are custom indices tracking relative institutional positioning. Without access to order flow aggregators, asset class rotation metrics, or dedicated institutional flow indicators, this signal cannot be accurately translated into technical indicator conditions. Recommended: Source external order flow data feed or implement custom order flow aggregation logic outside the standard indicator set.
